modules.gui.main package#

Submodules#

modules.gui.main.field_widget module#

class FieldWidget(series: Series, mainwindow: QMainWindow)[source]#

Bases: QWidget, FieldView

CLOSEDTRACE = 4#
FLAG = 8#
GRID = 7#
KNIFE = 2#
OPENTRACE = 5#
PANZOOM = 1#
POINTER = 0#
SCISSORS = 3#
STAMP = 6#
activateMouseBoundaryTimer()[source]#

Activate the timer to check the mouse boundary.

autoMerge()[source]#

Automatically merge the selected traces of the same name.

backspace()[source]#

Called when backspace OR Del is pressed: either delete traces or undo line trace.

checkMouseBoundary()[source]#

Move the window if the mouse is close to the boundary.

closeFlagComments()[source]#

Close the flag comments display.

createField(series: Series)[source]#

Re-creates the field widget.

Params:

series (Series): the new series to load

createTraceFlag(trace: Trace = None)[source]#

Create a flag associated with a trace.

deactivateMouseBoundaryTimer()[source]#

Deactivate the timer to check the mouse near boundary.

deleteAll(tags=False)[source]#

Delete all traces in the series that match the trace name (and possibly tags).

Params:

tags (bool): True if tags should be compared

displayFlagComments()[source]#

Display the comments an a flag that has been hovered over.

drawBorder(painter: QPainter, color: tuple)[source]#

Draw a border around the field (called during paintEvent).

Params:

painter (QPainter): the painter for the field color(tuple): the color for the border

editFlag(event=None)[source]#

Edit a flag. (Triggered by action)

endPendingEvents()[source]#

End ongoing events that are connected to the mouse.

eraserMove(event)[source]#

Called when the user is erasing.

event(event)[source]#

Overwritten from QWidget.event.

Added to catch gestures and zorder events.

findContourDialog()[source]#

Open a dilog to prompt user to find contour.

flagRelease(event)[source]#

Called when mouse is released in flag mode.

generateView(generate_image=True, generate_traces=True, update=True)[source]#

Generate the output view.

Params:

generate_image (bool): True if image should be regenerated generate_traces (bool): True if traces should be regenerated update (bool): True if view widget should be updated

gestureEvent(event: QGestureEvent)[source]#

Called when gestures are detected.

gridPress(event)[source]#

Creates a grid on the mouse location.

gridRelease(event)[source]#

Called when mouse is released in grid mode.

isSingleClicking()[source]#

Check if user is single-clicking.

Returns:

(bool) True if user is single-clicking

knifeMove(event)[source]#

Called when mouse is moved in pencil mode with a mouse button pressed.

Draws continued knife trace on the screen.

knifePress(event)[source]#

Called when mouse is pressed in knife mode.

Begins creating a new trace.

knifeRelease(event)[source]#

Called when mouse is released in pencil mode.

Completes and adds trace.

linePress(event)[source]#

Called when mouse is pressed in a line mode.

Begins create a line trace.

lineRelease(event=None, override=False, log_event=True)[source]#

Called when mouse is released in line mode.

markTime()[source]#

Keep track of the time on the series file.

mouseMoveEvent(event)[source]#

Called when mouse is moved.

Overwritten from QWidget class.

mousePanzoomMove(event)[source]#

Called when mouse is moved in panzoom mode.

mousePanzoomPress(event)[source]#

Called when mouse is clicked in panzoom mode.

Saves the position of the mouse.

mousePanzoomRelease(event)[source]#

Called when mouse is released in panzoom mode.

mousePressEvent(event)[source]#

Called when mouse is clicked.

Overwritten from QWidget class.

mouseReleaseEvent(event)[source]#

Called when mouse button is released.

Overwritten from QWidget Class.

openFlagList()[source]#

Open a flag list.

openObjectList()[source]#

Open an object list.

openSectionList()[source]#

Open a section list.

openTraceList()[source]#

Open a trace list.

openZtraceList()[source]#

Open a ztrace list.

paintBorder(field_painter: QPainter)[source]#

Paint the borders for the field.

paintEvent(event)[source]#

Called when self.update() and various other functions are run.

Overwritten from QWidget. Paints self.field_pixmap onto self (the widget).

paintText(field_painter: QPainter)[source]#

Paint the corner text onto the field.

paintWorkingTrace(field_painter: QPainter)[source]#

Paint the work trace on the field.

panzoomMove(new_x=None, new_y=None, zoom_factor=1)[source]#

Generates image output for panning and zooming.

Params:

new_x: the x from panning new_y: the y from panning zoom_factor: the scale from zooming

panzoomPress(x, y)[source]#

Initiates panning and zooming mode.

Params:

x: the x position of the start y: the y position of the start

panzoomRelease(new_x=None, new_y=None, zoom_factor=None)[source]#

Generates image output for panning and zooming.

Params:

new_x: the x from panning new_y: the y from panning zoom_factor: the scale from zooming

pencilMove(event)[source]#

Called when mouse is moved in pencil mode with the left mouse button pressed.

Draws continued trace on the screen.

pencilRelease(event)[source]#

Called when mouse is released in pencil mode.

Completes and adds trace.

pointerMove(event)[source]#

Called when mouse is moved in pointer mode.

pointerPress(event)[source]#

Called when mouse is pressed in pointer mode.

Selects/deselects the nearest trace

pointerRelease(event)[source]#

Called when mouse is released in pointer mode.

refreshTables(refresh_data=False)[source]#

Refresh the series data and the corresponding data in the tables.

resizeEvent(event)[source]#

Scale field window if main window size changes.

Overwritten from QWidget Class.

scissorsPress(event)[source]#

Identifies the nearest trace and allows user to poly edit it.

setCuration(cr_status: str, traces: list = None)[source]#

Set the curation for the selected traces.

Params:

cr_status (str): the curation status to set for the traces traces (list): the list of traces to set

setLeftHanded(left_handed=None)[source]#

Set the handedness of the user

Params:

left_handed (bool): True if user is left handed

setMouseMode(mode: int)[source]#

Set the mode of the mouse.

Params:

mode (int): number corresponding to mouse mode

setTracingTrace(trace: Trace)[source]#

Set the trace used by the pencil/line tracing/stamp.

Params:

trace (Trace): the new trace to use as refernce for further tracing

setViewMagnification(new_mag: float = None)[source]#

Set the scaling for the section view.

Params:

new_mag (float): the new magnification (pixels per micron)

stampMove(event)[source]#

Called when mouse is moved in stamp mode.

stampPress(event)[source]#

Called when mouse is pressed in stamp mode.

Creates a stamp centered on the mouse location.

stampRelease(event)[source]#

Called when mouse is released in stamp mode.

staticMetaObject = PySide6.QtCore.QMetaObject("FieldWidget" inherits "QWidget": )#
toggleBlend()[source]#

Toggle blending sections.

traceDialog()[source]#

Opens dialog to edit selected traces.

traceMove(event)[source]#

Called when mouse is moved in trace mode.

tracePress(event)[source]#

Called when mouse is pressed in trace mode.

traceRelease(event)[source]#

Called when mouse is released in trace mode.

unlockSection()[source]#

Unlock the current section.

updateStatusBar(trace: Trace = None)[source]#

Update status bar with useful information.

Params:

trace (Trace): optional trace to add to status bar

ztraceDialog()[source]#

Opens a dialog to edit selected traces.

formatAsParagraph(text: str, per_line=50, max_lines=20)[source]#

Format text as a paragraph.

Params:

text (str): the text to format per_line (int): the characters per line max_lines (int): max number of lines in paragraph

modules.gui.main.main_window module#

class MainWindow(filename)[source]#

Bases: QMainWindow

addTo3D(obj_names, ztraces=False)[source]#

Generate the 3D view for a list of objects.

Params:

obj_names (list): a list of object names

allOptions()[source]#
autoBackup()[source]#

Set up the auto-backup functionality for the series.

backspace()[source]#

Called when backspace is pressed.

calibrateMag(trace_lengths: dict = None)[source]#

Calibrate the pixel size for the series.

Params:

trace_lengths (dict): the lengths of traces to calibrate

changeAlignment()[source]#

Open dialog to modify and change alignments.

Params:

alignment_name (str): the name of the alignment ro switch to

changeClosedTraceMode(new_mode=None)[source]#

Change the closed trace mode (trace, rectangle, circle).

changeMouseMode(new_mode)[source]#

Change the mouse mode of the field (pointer, panzoom, tracing…).

Called when user clicks on mouse mode palette.

Params:

new_mode: the new mouse mode to set

changeSection(section_num: int = None, save=True)[source]#

Change the section of the field.

Params:

section_num (int): the section number to change to save (bool): saves data to files if True

changeSrcDir(new_src_dir: str = None, notify=False)[source]#

Open a series of dialogs to change the image source directory.

Params:

new_src_dir (str): the new image directory notify (bool): True if user is to be notified with a pop-up

changeTform(new_tform_list: list = None)[source]#

Open a dialog to change the transform of a section.

changeTracingTrace(trace)[source]#

Change the trace utilized by the user.

Called when user clicks on trace palette.

Params:

trace: the new tracing trace to set

changeUsername(new_name: str = None)[source]#

Edit the login name used to track history.

Params:

new_name (str): the new username

checkActions(context_menu=False, clicked_trace=None, clicked_label=None)[source]#

Check for actions that should be enabled or disabled

Params:

context_menu (bool): True if context menu is being generated clicked_trace (Trace): the trace that was clicked on IF the cotext menu is being generated

closeEvent(event)[source]#

Save all data to files when the user exits.

copy()[source]#

Called when Ctrl+C is pressed.

createContextMenus()[source]#

Create the right-click menus used in the field.

createMenuBar()[source]#

Create the menu for the main window.

createPaletteShortcuts()[source]#

Create shortcuts associate with the mouse palette.

createShortcuts()[source]#

Create shortcuts that are NOT included in any menus.

deleteDuplicateTraces()[source]#

Remove all duplicate traces from the series.

displayShortcuts()[source]#

Display the shortcuts.

edit3DSmoothing(smoothing_alg: str = '')[source]#

Modify the algorithm used for 3D smoothing.

Params:

smoothing_alg (str): the name of the smoothing algorithm to use

editImage(option: str, direction: str, log_event=True)[source]#

Edit the brightness or contrast of the image.

Params:

option (str): brightness or contrast direction (str): up or down

exportToXML(export_fp: str = None)[source]#

Export the current series to XML.

Params:

export_fp (str): the filepath for the XML .ser file

exportToZarr()[source]#

Create a neuroglancer-compatible zarr for autosegmentation.

findObjectFirst(obj_name=None)[source]#

Find the first or last contour in the series.

Params:

obj_name (str): the name of the object to find

flickerSections()[source]#

Switch between the current and b sections.

hideSeriesTraces(hidden=True)[source]#

Hide or unhide all traces in the entire series.

Params:

hidden (bool) True if traces will be hidden

importBC(jser_fp: str = None)[source]#

Import the brightness/contrast settings from another jser series.

Params:

jser_fp (str): the filepath with the series to import data from

importFlags(jser_fp: str = None)[source]#

Import flags from another series.

importLabels(all=False)[source]#

Import labels from a zarr.

importSeriesTransforms(jser_fp: str = None)[source]#

Import the transforms from another series.

Params:

jser_fp (str): the filepath with the series to import data from

importSwiftTransforms(swift_fp=None)[source]#

Import transforms from a text file.

Params:

swift_fp (str): the filepath for the transforms file

importTracePalette(jser_fp: str = None)[source]#

Import the trace palette from another series.

Params:

jser_fp (str): the filepath with the series to import data from

importTraces(jser_fp: str = None)[source]#

Import traces from another jser series.

Params:

jser_fp (str): the filepath with the series to import data from

importTransforms(tforms_fp: str = None)[source]#

Import transforms from a text file.

Params:

tforms_file (str): the filepath for the transforms file

importZtraces(jser_fp: str = None)[source]#

Import ztraces from another jser series.

Params:

jser_fp (str): the filepath with the series to import data from

incrementSection(down=False)[source]#

Increment the section number by one.

Params:

down (bool): the direction to move

keyReleaseEvent(event)[source]#

Overwritten: checks for Ctrl+Zoom.

manualBackup()[source]#

Back up the series to a specified location.

markKeep()[source]#

Add the selected trace to the most recent “keep” segmentation group.

mergeLabels()[source]#

Merge selected labels in a zarr.

modifyGrid(event=None)[source]#

Modify the grid properties.

modifyKnife(event=None)[source]#

Modify the knife properties.

modifyPointer(event=None)[source]#

Modify the pointer properties.

newAlignment(new_alignment_name: str)[source]#

Add a new alignment (based on existing alignment).

Params:

new_alignment_name (str): the name of the new alignment

newFromXML(series_fp: str = None)[source]#

Create a new series from a set of XML files.

Params:

series_fp (str): the filepath for the XML series

newSeries(image_locations: list = None, series_name: str = None, mag: float = None, thickness: float = None, from_zarr: bool = False)[source]#

Create a new series from a set of images.

Params:

image_locations (list): the filepaths for the section images.

openFlagList()[source]#

Open the flag widget.

openObjectList()[source]#

Open the object list widget.

openSectionList()[source]#

Open the section list widget.

openSeries(series_obj=None, jser_fp=None)[source]#

Open an existing series and create the field.

Params:

series_obj (Series): the series object (optional)

openTraceList()[source]#

Open the trace list widget.

openWiki()[source]#

Open kh lab PyReconstruct public wiki.

openZtraceList()[source]#

Open the ztrace list widget.

pasteAttributesToPalette(use_shape=False)[source]#

Paste the attributes from the first clipboard trace to the selected palette button.

predict(data_fp: str = None)[source]#

Run predictons.

Params:

data_fp (str): the filepath for the zarr

removeFrom3D(obj_names, ztraces=False)[source]#

Remove objects from 3D viewer.

Params:

obj_names (list): a list of object names

removeZarrLayer()[source]#

Remove an existing zarr layer.

resetTracePalette()[source]#

Reset the trace palette to default traces.

restart()[source]#
saveAllData()[source]#

Write current series and section data into backend JSON files.

saveAsToJser(close=False)[source]#

Prompt the user to find a save location.

saveToJser(notify=False, close=False)[source]#

Save all data to JSER file.

Params:

save_data (bool): True if series and section files in backend should be save close (bool): Deletes backend series if True

segment(data_fp: str = None)[source]#

Run an autosegmentation.

Params:

data_fp (str): the filepath for the zarr

seriesModified(modified=True)[source]#

Change the title of the window reflect modifications.

setFillOpacity(opacity: float = None)[source]#

Set the opacity of the trace highlight.

Params:

opacity (float): the new fill opacity

setFindZoom()[source]#

Set the magnification for find contour.

setLayerGroup(group_name)[source]#

Set the specific group displayed in the zarr layer.

setToFlag(flag: Flag)[source]#

Focus the field on a flag.

Params:

flag (Flag): the flag

setToObject(obj_name: str, section_num: int)[source]#

Focus the field on an object from a specified section.

Params:

obj_name (str): the name of the object section_num (int): the section the object is located

setZarrLayer(zarr_dir=None)[source]#

Set a zarr layer.

srcToZarr(create_new=True)[source]#

Convert the series images to zarr.

staticMetaObject = PySide6.QtCore.QMetaObject("MainWindow" inherits "QMainWindow": )#
toggleCuration()[source]#

Quick shortcut to toggle curation on/off for the tables.

toggleZtraces()[source]#

Toggle whether ztraces are shown.

train(retrain=False)[source]#

Train an autosegmentation model.

translate(direction: str, amount: str)[source]#

Translate the current transform.

Params:

direction (str): left, right, up, or down amount (str): small, med, or big

undo(redo=False)[source]#

Perform an undo/redo action.

Params:

redo (bool): True if redo should be performed

updateCurationFromHistory()[source]#

Update the series curation from the history.

viewSeriesHistory()[source]#

View the history for the entire series.

wheelEvent(event)[source]#

Called when mouse scroll is used.
